hooks.command: command -v byetex >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'ByeTex plugin: the `byetex` binary is not on PATH — its MCP server and CLI need it. Install one of: `cargo install byetex` | `brew install zeyuyang42/byetex/byetex` | `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zeyuyang42/ByeTex/main/install.sh | sh`.'
